posts.text:
Fox News refuses to report the truth:

Texas and Florida are the REAL high-tax states.

Video

Thank you, Texas!!


Newsom News (@NewsomNews)

NEWSOM PACKS LABOR HALL WITH CONGRESSMAN CASAR THIS MORNING!







— https://nitter.net/NewsomNews/status/2033229708209401922#m

Miami — a night we won’t forget.

To the legendary father-daughter duo, @jorgeramosnews and @paoramos — thank you for welcoming us and for digging deep into the stories behind Young Man in a Hurry.

The Trump story is a corruption story.

Video

I met with a kid whose parents disappeared while they were at their jobs of 25 years.

Greg Bovino and Donald Trump’s secret police are terrorizing our communities.

Video
Join me in Miami, FL, with @jorgeramosnews and @paoramos to discuss my new book Young Man in a Hurry. nitter.net/i/broadcasts/1YxNrZRVX…

Tommy Tuberville proves to the world that a football hitting your head can turn you into a racist piece of shit. Congrats, Tommy.


Coach Tommy Tuberville (@SenTuberville)

The enemy is inside the gates.



— https://nitter.net/SenTuberville/status/2032087973810901496#m

Antisemitism is disgusting. My heart is with the Jewish community in Michigan today. 

California is coordinating with our law enforcement partners to keep our Jewish communities safe.


Governor Newsom Press Office (@GovPressOffice)

We are praying for the Temple Israel synagogue community in West Bloomfield. Antisemitism is vile!

As @Cal_OES monitors this incident in Michigan, the state continues to coordinate with local and federal law enforcement to protect our Jewish community in the Golde

The “freedom” party strikes again.


FactPost (@factpostnews)

GOP Sen. Josh Hawley has introduced a new bill to ban the abortion pill mifepristone.







— https://nitter.net/factpostnews/status/2031827799699280096#m

Don’t worry, America!

Your gas prices are going up — but Trump is making lots of money.

So it’s ok.

What a joke.

Joe Lombardo is praising Donald Trump’s illegal war — that cost the American people $1.5 BILLION in gas costs JUST THIS WEEK.

Nevada — REMEMBER THIS.

Vote Lombardo out this November.


Aaron Rupar (@atrupar)

RALSTON: Are you still a fan of President Trump?  

GOV. JOE LOMBARDO: Yeah, I think he's doing, he's doing a good job. I think he's -- there's a lot of nuanc-- and presentation styles that people don't agree with, that I don't agree with sometimes. But I think as our leader

My message to Stephen Miller is simple:

RESIGN.

Video

Donald Trump has wrecked our economy.

We used to be the envy of the world. 

Now, our gas prices are soaring. 

Inflation is up.

Unemployment is sky rocketing. 

And he’s busy in court fighting to TAX the American people.

Video

I spoke about my dyslexia.

I know that’s hard for a brain-dead moron who bombs children and protects pedophiles to understand.

He's talking about himself in third person again.


Acyn (@Acyn)

Trump: Newsom had admitted he has mental problems, that he's not a smart person, that he’s unable to read a speech. He can't read. I don't want the president of the United States to have a cognitive deficiency.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Acyn/status/2031844102594306288#m

The Trump story is one of corruption. Every family business deal, every foreign trip, every tariff, every envoy. This is a grift the likes of which we've never seen in the history of this country.

Video

Governor Newsom announces new statewide accountability, funding for homelessness & mental health
Fox News refuses to report the truth: Texas and Florida are the REAL high-tax states.

Miami — a night we won’t forget. To the legendary father-daughter duo, @Jorge Ramos and @Paola Ramos — thank you for welcoming us and for digging deep into the stories behind Young Man in a Hurry. Grateful for the dialogue, and grateful for a city that shows up the way only Miami can. Young Man in a Hurry is available now: youngmaninahurrybook.com @Jennifer Siebel Newsom @Carlos_Eduardo_Espina
The Trump story is a corruption story.
I met with a kid whose parents disappeared while they were at their jobs of 25 years. Greg Bovino and Donald Trump’s secret police are terrorizing our communities.
The Trump story is one of corruption. Every family business deal, every foreign trip, every tariff, every envoy. This is a grift the likes of which we've never seen in the history of this country.
Donald Trump is all about destruction. Destruction is not strength. He’s not a builder. Any jackass can knock down a barn, it takes a skilled carpenter to build one. Donald Trump is a jackass.
Gone, but not forgotten.
Donald Trump launched a war with no plan, no strategy and no explanation. Service members have died and he’s spent more time talking about his drapes. That says everything about who he is.
While Donald Trump cuts food stamps and Medicaid, he's funding a war with no endgame, no justification and no Congressional approval. He’s a broken president putting American lives at risk.
Nashville, Atlanta, Rock Hill, New York, San Francisco — and we’re just getting started. Grab your copy now: youngmaninahurrybook.com
